briefing_summary: Top art news for April 1, 2026: The month kicks off with high anticipation for museum openings including the David Geffen Galleries at LACMA and the V&A East in London. A packed international art fair schedule begins with key dates starting around April 9-12 (EXPO CHICAGO, Art Paris, Artexpo NY) and continuing through mid-April (Dallas Art Fair, San Francisco Art Fair).
